accessibility.colorContrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for large text and icons

patterns.formLayout: Single column, max-width 640px, labels above fields
patterns.errorHandling: Inline validation on blur. Error summary at top of form for multiple errors. Preserve user input on error.
patterns.progressiveDisclosure: Use accordions for optional information. Use stepper for multi-step flows.
patterns.navigation: Sidebar for account management. Stepper for quote flows. Breadcrumbs for sub-pages.
